name: Scallops in Lemon Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a glass dish (8-inch pan works well) with rosemary, basil, and salt over high power for 1 minute.
2. Add scallops and lemon juice, stirring to coat the scallops evenly.
3. Reduce heat to medium (60%) power. Cover with waxed paper and cook for 7-8 minutes, or until scallops are tender and white. Stir gently twice during cooking time.
4. Sprinkle paprika over scallops, cover again with waxed paper, and let carry over cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Serve and enjoy.
1 serving = 1-1/2 fat exchange
: 3 fat-meat exchange
: 235 calories
: 0 g carbohydrate
: 21 g protein
: 16.5 g fat
